concerns.text: MemoryBuffer entity defines 'access_count' field but no plan phase explicitly tracks or uses this field. Consider either removing the field or adding a plan step that records access counts.

Schema constrains specialization_index maximum to 10, but data-model.md and spec.md define it as bounded by log₂(N_agents). For N=7 agents, theoretical max is ~2.81. Contract is overly permissive; consider tightening to match data model.

Constitution Principle V (Versioning Discipline) states 'Content hash for all artifacts' but plan doesn't specify storage location. Constitution requires hashes in state/projects/...yaml. Add explicit reference to state file for hash storage.
